song.title: Amazing Grace
song.author: John Newton, et al.
song.presentation: V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 V6 V7 V8
song.lyrics:
[V1] . D D7 G D Amazing grace, how sweet the sound . Bm E A A7 That saved a wretch like me. . D D7 G D I once was lost but now I'm found, . Bm A G D Was blind but now I see.
[V2] ‘Twas grace that taught my heart to fear, And grace my fears relieved. How precious did that grace appear The hour I first believed.
[V3] Through many dangers, toils, and snares I have already come. 'Tis grace that brought me safe thus far, And grace will lead me home.
[V4] The Lord has promised good to me, His word my hope secures. He will my shield and portion be, As long as life endures.
[V5] How sweet the name of Jesus sounds, In a believer’s ears. It soothes his sorrows, heals his wounds, And drives away his fears.
[V6] And, when this flesh and heart shall fail, And mortal life shall cease, I shall possess within the veil, A life of joy and peace. .. .. .. --- [V7] The earth shall soon dissolve like snow, The sun forbear to shine; But God, who called me here below, Will be forever mine.
[V8] When we've been there 10,000 years, Bright shining as the sun, We've no less days to sing God's praise Than when we'd first begun.
